summary: Tested tournament current_round_info feature for dynamic hero card. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Competition switcher shows LEGHE and TORNEI sections correctly, TournamentView renders with fallback registration UI when no rounds exist.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/tournaments/{id} returns current_round_info field with correct structure (round_id, status, opponent_name, my_points, opp_points, total_matches, my_predictions_count, matchup_id, live_total)
VERIFIED: current_round_info is null for tournaments in registration phase (no rounds)
VERIFIED: Knockout tournament (b3e9021f) returns current_round_info with status COMPLETED
VERIFIED: Effective status logic works (OPEN/LIVE/COMPLETED based on round and match statuses)
VERIFIED: Frontend TournamentView shows registration fallback UI ('Sei iscritto — In attesa di inizio') when current_round_info is null
VERIFIED: Competition switcher dropdown shows LEGHE and TORNEI sections
VERIFIED: User's registered tournaments appear in TORNEI section with lightning bolt icons
VERIFIED: Tournament status badge shows 'ISCRIZIONI APERTE' for registration phase tournaments

success_rate.frontend: 95% - TournamentView renders correctly, competition switcher works

context_for_next_testing_agent: The current_round_info feature is working correctly. Backend returns the new field for all tournaments. For tournaments with active rounds, it contains round details, opponent info, and status (OPEN/LIVE/COMPLETED). For registration phase tournaments, it's null. The frontend TournamentView handles both cases: shows dynamic hero card when current_round_info exists, shows registration fallback when null. User ilio@raimondi.it is registered in 2 tournaments (both in registration phase). Admin user can test knockout tournament b3e9021f which has round data.

verified_features.backend_null_for_registration: PASS - Returns null when no rounds
verified_features.backend_rounds_array: PASS - Tournament detail includes rounds array
verified_features.frontend_competition_switcher: PASS - Shows LEGHE and TORNEI sections
verified_features.frontend_tournament_fallback_ui: PASS - Shows registration status when no rounds
verified_features.frontend_tab_bar: PASS - Home, Statistics, Predictions, Rankings, Profile visible
verified_features.frontend_league_home: PASS - Shows matchday card with GIORNATA label
